"use strict";(()=>{var s=window.parent,r=new Map,c=0,l=null,t=null;function u(n){s.postMessage({jsonrpc:"2.0",...n},"*")}function i(n,e){let o=c++;return new Promise((d,a)=>{r.set(o,{resolve:d,reject:a}),u({id:o,method:n,params:e})})}window.addEventListener("message",n=>{if(n.source!==s)return;let e=n.data;if(!(!e||e.jsonrpc!=="2.0")){if(e.id!=null&&r.has(e.id)){let o=r.get(e.id);r.delete(e.id),e.error?o.reject(new Error(e.error.message||"MCP Apps host request failed")):o.resolve(e.result);return}e.method==="ui/notifications/tool-result"&&l?.(e.params||{})}},{passive:!0});globalThis.NexusMcpBridge={connect(n){return l=n,t??=i("ui/initialize",{appInfo:{name:"Nexus day card",version:"1.0.0"},appCapabilities:{},protocolVersion:"2026-01-26"}).then(()=>{u({method:"ui/notifications/initialized"})}),t},callTool(n,e){return i("tools/call",{name:n,arguments:e})}};})();
